title: GetResponse vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse vs Moosend: pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing platform suits your business needs.
h1: GetResponse vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: GetResponse and Moosend are both popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different business needs. GetResponse excels as a comprehensive marketing platform with webinars and courses, while Moosend focuses on affordability and unlimited emails. This comparison will help you decide which tool is right for your business.
choose_a_if: You need webinar hosting and online course functionality built-in
You want to create advanced conversion funnels and sales workflows
You're an online course creator or digital product seller
choose_b_if: You need the most affordable email marketing solution
You want a larger free tier with 1,000 subscribers included
You prioritize unlimited emails and straightforward automation

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. GetResponse offers more comprehensive features including webinars and courses, making it ideal for digital product creators. Moosend excels in affordability and simplicity, with better customer ratings and a more generous free tier. Choose GetResponse for feature richness, Moosend for value.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month versus GetResponse's $19/month. Moosend also offers double the free subscriber limit (1,000 vs 500). For budget-conscious businesses, Moosend provides better value, though GetResponse's extra features may justify the higher price for some users.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports. You can export your contacts and subscribers from Moosend and import them into GetResponse. Most email marketing platforms support CSV exports, making the migration process straightforward. Check each platform's migration guides for specific steps.
